response.global_analysis: The audio consists entirely of dialogue and banter during a 'Whack-a-Gnome' game played by the members of hololive English -Justice-. No vocal music is present, so the reference JSON is correctly ignored. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the spoken vocalizations of the four characters (Raora Panthera, Cecilia Immergreen, Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, and Gigi Murin) and the narrator, Smokey. On-screen text for Smokey's dialogue is used to ensure precise transcription of his distorted robotic voice. Phrases are split logically to remain under the 50-character limit.
